changeSet.author: msd
changeSet.comment:
TARDIS-31: split monolithic 'app' schema by domain. Drop the cross-domain FK on owner_id (notebooks domain is slated to move to NoSQL — see api/docs/domain-boundaries.md), then move app.notebooks into its own 'notebooks' schema. Pure DDL — no data is rewritten.
The FK was created inline in 0002 without an explicit name, so PostgreSQL auto-generated 'notebooks_owner_id_fkey'. DROP ... IF EXISTS is defensive: if anyone dropped it manually earlier, this still succeeds.

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE notebooks.notebooks SET SCHEMA app; DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS notebooks;
